pi_items.source: README.md line 82: 'All models sourced from official eQUEST training workbook examples (doe2.com)'

privileged_info_summary: The 4StoreyBuilding is a verified real multi-storey commercial building model with 4 floors and multiple thermal zones sourced from official eQUEST training workbook examples. The exterior walls are constructed with Stucco (1in), Insulation Board (3/4in), a resistance layer (R=8.6), and Gypsum Board (1/2in). The EWall Construction has a current solar absorptance value of 0.6, which is the target to be modified to 0.5 in the modify_wall_absorptance task. All data is real building simulation data, not synthetic.
